subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-'Alí! Time and again hast thou been blessed with the remembrance of the Wronged One of the horizons. I swear by the Sun of the heaven of Will [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل علی مره بعد مره بذکر مظلوم آفاق فائز شدی قسم بافتاب سماء مشیت
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
